title: Triage 5 candidate models through the gate
context: After the candidate catalog is built, five models from that catalog need to pass through the gate to produce committed PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifacts confirming which are eligible for card tasks. These gate artifacts feed card-013, card-014, and scale-018. Depends on gate-003, ncpolicy-004, and catalog-011.
objective: Apply the gate-003 checklist to five candidate models from the MODEL-CATALOG.md, produce a committed gate artifact for each (PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE + rationale), and confirm which models are eligible for model card authoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Five models from the MODEL-CATALOG.md evaluated; each has a committed gate artifact (PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE + rationale).

Each PASS artifact records model and dataset license ids, URLs, and snapshots (committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback), and confirms permitsDerivatives:true (model) and permitsUse:true (each dataset) with cited evidence; data confirmed open/de-identified.
Any controlled-access/identifiable data, NC conflict, or unclear license results in FLAG/EXCLUDE with the specific concern surfaced.
ncpolicy-004 is applied to any COSMIC/OncoKB/cBioPortal-backed models encountered.
All five gate artifacts reviewed and approved by the Data-License+Privacy reviewer.
Gate artifacts committed to the project repo.
resources: PLAN.md — Pipeline (per model), Triage & gate step
output: Five committed gate artifacts (PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE) for five candidate cancer ML models, reviewed and approved by the Data-License+Privacy reviewer.
